issues.name: flutter_datetime_picker
issues.reason: Uses deprecated Theme APIs; causes instant render crashes on Impeller.
issues.migrationNotes: Minor rewrite. Update widget calls and dialog context handling.

issues.name: flutter_facebook_login
issues.reason: SDKs are ancient; fails Gradle builds and violates modern iOS privacy manifests.
issues.migrationNotes: Drop-in API change, but requires updating FB developer console hashes.

issues.name: apple_sign_in
issues.reason: Obsolete cryptography; using this triggers automatic App Store review rejections.
issues.migrationNotes: Moderate effort. Security nonce and identity token handling changed.

issues.name: adhara_socket_io
issues.reason: Hardcoded to Socket.io v2; immediately disconnects from modern Node.js backends.
issues.migrationNotes: Moderate rewrite. Change connection builders and stream subscriptions.

issues.name: flutter_money_formatter
issues.reason: No Null Safety; completely refuses to compile on Dart 3.0+.
issues.migrationNotes: Use standard Dart localization number formats.

issues.name: progress_dialog
issues.reason: Context leaks and layout overflows break modern navigation stacks.
issues.migrationNotes: Total rewrite. Just use native Flutter dialogs with a CircularProgressIndicator.

issues.name: flutter_rating_bar
issues.reason: Gesture math is broken on high-refresh-rate screens (120Hz+).

issues.name: flutter_offline
issues.reason: Underlying connectivity logic reports false positives on Android 14+.
issues.migrationNotes: Huge logic change. Must manually build the Offline overlay UI now.

issues.name: clippy_flutter
issues.reason: Legacy canvas painting logic creates severe visual artifacting.
issues.migrationNotes: Draw paths manually to ensure GPU compatibility.

issues.name: flutter_masked_text
issues.reason: Massive memory leaks from un-disposed internal TextEditingControllers.
issues.migrationNotes: Moderate. Replaces custom controllers with native `inputFormatters`.

issues.name: ff_navigation_bar
issues.reason: Throws "RenderBox was not laid out" exceptions on device rotation.
issues.migrationNotes: Total UI replacement. Different configuration parameters.

issues.name: states_rebuilder
issues.reason: Incompatible with modern Dart class modifiers (sealed/final).
issues.migrationNotes: Total architecture rewrite. Requires migrating to event-driven state.

issues.name: flutter_google_places
issues.reason: Locked to ancient HTTP dependencies; causes unresolvable pubspec conflicts.
issues.migrationNotes: Moderate. Parameter mapping is slightly different.

issues.name: zefyr
issues.reason: Architecture is dead; keyboard handling completely broken on iOS 18.
issues.migrationNotes: Huge rewrite. Document formats (JSON) are different. Need data migration.

issues.name: builder
issues.reason: Half-finished project; core layout files throw null exceptions.

issues.name: flutter_twitter_login
issues.reason: Hardcoded to Twitter API v1.1; 100% fail rate since X killed the endpoints.
issues.migrationNotes: Rewrite auth logic to support X API v2.

issues.name: stripe_payment
issues.reason: Uses deprecated Stripe APIs; transactions will be rejected by the processor.
issues.migrationNotes: Total rewrite. Use the official SDK; update backend webhook logic too.

issues.name: flutter_audio_recorder
issues.reason: Fails on Android 14+ due to new strict microphone background policies.
issues.migrationNotes: Moderate. Better async permission handling and codec support.

issues.name: chewie_audio
issues.reason: Stagnant codebase; doesn't support modern system-level audio routing.
issues.migrationNotes: Total rewrite. `just_audio` is far more powerful but requires custom UI.

issues.name: flutter_speed_dial
issues.reason: Animation controllers misfire, causing UI to permanently lock up.
issues.migrationNotes: Total rewrite. Use Flutter's modern native custom FAB animations.

issues.name: websafe_svg
issues.reason: Obsolete; Flutter natively supports Web SVGs now. Adds dead weight.
issues.migrationNotes: Drop-in replacement. Change package imports.

issues.name: flutter_statusbar_manager
issues.reason: Conflicts directly with modern Flutter SystemChrome implementations.

issues.name: nice_button
issues.reason: Uses syntax completely removed from the Dart language; won't compile.

issues.name: liquid_progress_indicator
issues.reason: Shaders are incompatible with Impeller, causing screen-tearing glitches.
issues.migrationNotes: UI swap. Linear and circular alternatives available.

issues.name: flutter_tags
issues.reason: Internal state management is broken; deleting tags crashes the app.
issues.migrationNotes: Moderate rewrite. Different controller logic.

issues.name: flutter_markdown
issues.reason: Discontinued by Google; vulnerable to unpatched markdown injection flaws.
issues.migrationNotes: Moderate. Syntax highlighters and builders must be mapped.

issues.name: flutter_adaptive_scaffold
issues.reason: Discontinued; relies on older layout constraints that fail on foldable phones.
issues.migrationNotes: Total rewrite. Roll your own responsive breakpoints.

issues.name: ios_platform_images
issues.reason: Discontinued; redundant since modern Flutter seamlessly handles iOS assets.

issues.name: palette_generator
issues.reason: Discontinued; incredibly slow on modern high-res device camera feeds.
issues.migrationNotes: Moderate rewrite. Different async methods for extracting dominant colors.

issues.name: flutter_image
issues.reason: Discontinued; memory leaks heavily compared to modern network image caching.

issues.name: js
issues.reason: Completely replaced by modern Wasm-compatible dart:js_interop.

issues.name: scoped_model
issues.reason: Ancient logic that causes massive, app-wide widget rebuild jank.
issues.migrationNotes: Massive rewrite. Shift to `ChangeNotifierProvider`.

issues.name: provide
issues.reason: Officially deprecated by Google 7 years ago; full of syntax errors.
issues.migrationNotes: Massive rewrite. Shift to locator pattern.

issues.name: flutter_sparkline
issues.reason: Pre-null-safety; custom painters throw out-of-bounds exceptions.
issues.migrationNotes: Rewrite to use modern chart primitives.

issues.name: flutter_sticky_header
issues.reason: Completely breaks Flutter's modern sliver scroll physics; severe jank.
issues.migrationNotes: Moderate rewrite. Use native sliver logic wrapped in tools.

issues.name: flutter_circular_chart
issues.reason: Relies on dead animation APIs; chart simply renders as a black box.
issues.migrationNotes: Rewrite to use modern pie chart implementations.

issues.name: flutter_full_pdf_viewer
issues.reason: Platform channel architecture causes hard thread crashes on Android 15.
issues.migrationNotes: Total rewrite. New controller logic and memory management.

issues.name: flutter_html_view
issues.reason: Massive security risk; highly vulnerable to modern XSS injections.
issues.migrationNotes: Moderate. Update tag styling parameters.

issues.name: flutter_youtube_view
issues.reason: YouTube changed their iframe API policies; videos refuse to play.
issues.migrationNotes: Moderate. Swap controller initialization.

issues.name: flutter_webview_plugin
issues.reason: Uses the old v1 Android embedding; blocks app compilation entirely.
issues.migrationNotes: Total rewrite. Shift to modern `WebViewController` architecture.

issues.name: admob_flutter
issues.reason: Uses retired Google Ad APIs; ads will not serve and revenue is lost.
issues.migrationNotes: Complete rewrite of ad widget placement and initialization logic.

issues.name: firebase_admob
issues.reason: Discontinued officially; completely incompatible with current Firebase SDKs.
issues.migrationNotes: Complete rewrite. Ads decoupled from Firebase wrapper.

issues.name: flutter_blue
issues.reason: Over 800 open issues; completely fails to handle Android 14+ BLE permissions.
issues.migrationNotes: Moderate effort. Fork that fixes permissions; API is mostly similar.

issues.name: flutter_ble_lib
issues.reason: Native iOS bridge crashes instantly when requesting background execution.
issues.migrationNotes: Massive rewrite. Stream parsing is fundamentally different.

issues.name: flutter_beacon
issues.reason: Ghosted repo; hardware scanning methods are dead on modern mobile OS.

issues.name: flutter_nfc_reader
issues.reason: Lacks modern tag tech support; background reading is totally broken.

issues.name: contact_picker
issues.reason: Violates Play Store/App Store privacy policies by leaking full contact lists.

issues.name: contacts_service
issues.reason: Unmaintained; fails to fetch modern cross-linked cloud contacts.
issues.migrationNotes: Easy migration. Better cross-platform parameter support.

issues.name: sms
issues.reason: Android blocked this level of SMS access years ago; immediate crash.
issues.migrationNotes: Re-architect app to not require broad SMS reading.

issues.name: telephony
issues.reason: Fails modern foreground service requirements on Android 15/16.
issues.migrationNotes: Write native Kotlin/Swift for precise telecom functions.

issues.name: flutter_launch
issues.reason: Obsolete functionality that `url_launcher` has handled natively for years.
issues.migrationNotes: Complete drop-in URL execution.

issues.name: vibrate
issues.reason: Uses deprecated Android vibration classes that no longer trigger hardware.
issues.migrationNotes: Drop-in swap to `HapticFeedback.vibrate()`.

issues.name: flutter_incall
issues.reason: Audio route conflicts freeze the device speakerphone permanently.

issues.name: flutter_webrtc_wrapper
issues.reason: (Note: The 0.x versions) Video tracks desync and memory spike infinitely.
issues.migrationNotes: Heavy update. SDP negotiation methods changed.

issues.name: flutter_staggered_grid_view
issues.reason: (Original repo versions) Unoptimized scroll logic eats 100% of the CPU.
issues.migrationNotes: Drop-in API change to the maintained version.

issues.name: flutter_icons
issues.reason: Generates giant font files that drastically bloat app bundle size.

issues.name: font_awesome_flutter
issues.reason: (Legacy versions) Icons render as boxes due to missing font maps.
issues.migrationNotes: Fix pubspec constraints; update icon names.

issues.name: flutter_shimmer
issues.reason: Fails to render transparent gradients on Impeller engine correctly.
issues.migrationNotes: Replace shimmer widgets with Skeletonizer wrappers around your actual UI widgets.

issues.name: flutter_page_indicator
issues.reason: Animation logic expects PageController structures that are now obsolete.

issues.name: flutter_card_swipper
issues.reason: Ghosted project; memory management for image cards is nonexistent.

issues.name: snaplist
issues.reason: Custom scroll physics are completely broken by Flutter 3+ engine updates.

issues.name: carousel_pro
issues.reason: Dead UI library; auto-play timers will memory leak and crash the app.
issues.migrationNotes: Moderate rewrite. `carousel_slider` has a totally different builder pattern.

issues.name: flutter_swiper
issues.reason: Unmerged Null Safety PR has been sitting open for 4+ years.
issues.migrationNotes: Easy migration. Maintained fork with the exact same API.

issues.name: cached_network_image_v1
issues.reason: Legacy version 1.x; fundamentally incompatible with Dart 3 typing.
issues.migrationNotes: Drop-in mostly, but requires updating error builder syntax.

issues.name: multi_image_picker
issues.reason: Does not support Android Scoped Storage; returns dead file paths.
issues.migrationNotes: Total rewrite. Use official `pickMultiImage` method.

issues.name: image_picker_saver
issues.reason: Fails on iOS 16+ due to missing modern photo library permission flags.
issues.migrationNotes: Modern drop-in replacement for saving to gallery.

issues.name: flutter_exif
issues.reason: Buffer parsing logic throws formatting exceptions on modern HEIC photos.

issues.name: flutter_ffmpeg
issues.reason: Underlying mobile FFmpeg libraries are discontinued and fail to compile.
issues.migrationNotes: Massive rewrite. Execution syntax entirely refactored.

issues.name: flutter_sound_v7
issues.reason: (Legacy versions) Missing background service permissions for Android 15.
issues.migrationNotes: Complete rewrite of the playback session builder.

issues.name: audioplayers_v0
issues.reason: (v0.x versions) Native code fails to build on Apple Silicon (M1/M2/M3) Macs.

issues.name: flutter_vlc_player_orig
issues.reason: Severe texture cache issues lead to green-screen artifacting on video load.
issues.migrationNotes: Huge rewrite. Better Wasm/Desktop support.

issues.name: video_launcher
issues.reason: Obsolete wrapper; native OS no longer responds to these specific intents.
issues.migrationNotes: Route to native browser or system handlers safely.

issues.name: flutter_downloader
issues.reason: Progress synchronization isolates are broken, leaving ghost notifications.
issues.migrationNotes: Total rewrite of background task initialization.

issues.name: open_file_v3
issues.reason: Fails to map modern MIME types, causing the OS to reject opening PDFs/docs.
issues.migrationNotes: Easy migration. Maintained fork with exact API.

issues.name: file_picker_v3
issues.reason: (Legacy versions) Returns relative paths that the app lacks permission to read.

issues.name: path_provider_foundation
issues.overrideReason: v2.6.0 uses objective_c build hooks incompatible with custom_lint analyzer plugins

issues.name: path_provider_ex
issues.reason: Redundant; the official `path_provider` covers all external storage needs now.
issues.migrationNotes: Drop-in. Use the official modern directories.

issues.name: flutter_notifications_v8
issues.reason: (Pre-v10) Completely ignores Android 14+ POST_NOTIFICATIONS permission requirements.

issues.name: workmanager_v04
issues.reason: Background execution keys fail to register, so tasks never actually fire.
issues.migrationNotes: Moderate. Callbacks require stricter async handling.

issues.name: flutter_background_service
issues.reason: Fails to keep isolates alive; killed instantly by modern OS battery managers.
issues.migrationNotes: Moderate update. Adjust foreground notification hooks.

issues.name: android_alarm_manager
issues.reason: WakeLocks fail; alarms simply do not trigger when the screen is off.
issues.migrationNotes: Mostly drop-in, but requires updating AndroidManifest permissions.

issues.name: workmanager
issues.reason: Dead repo; incompatible with modern Android WorkManager architecture.

issues.name: geolocator_apple_v1
issues.reason: Standalone version dead; lacks modern iOS precise location toggles.
issues.migrationNotes: Do not use standalone components. Use main package.

issues.name: geolocator_android_v1
issues.reason: Standalone version dead; crashes on Android 14 location permission prompt.
issues.migrationNotes: Same as above. Use unified plugin.

issues.name: google_api_availability
issues.reason: Obsolete detection methods return false negatives on modern devices.
issues.migrationNotes: Write custom Kotlin script for exact API versioning.

issues.name: location_permissions
issues.reason: Completely replaced by `permission_handler`; causes manifest merge errors.
issues.migrationNotes: Total rewrite. Unified permission asking method.

issues.name: trust_fall
issues.reason: Easily bypassed by modern root tools; provides zero actual security in 2026.
issues.migrationNotes: Architecture rewrite. Implements much stricter TEE checking.

issues.name: safe_device
issues.reason: Flagged physical Samsung/Pixel devices as emulators due to outdated hardware lists.
issues.migrationNotes: Write custom logic using physical device flag.

issues.name: flutter_secure_storage
issues.reason: (Pre-v5.0) Keychain/Keystore logic is old; data can be wiped on OS upgrades.
issues.migrationNotes: Critical update. Fixes Android Keystore initialization.

issues.name: biometric_storage
issues.reason: Blocks the main UI thread during biometric handshakes, freezing the app.
issues.migrationNotes: Rewrite logic. Securely bind auth token to local storage manually.

issues.name: local_auth
issues.reason: Dead standalone package; lacks modern strong biometric fallback handlers.

issues.name: flutter_app_badger
issues.reason: Badge counting logic is entirely broken on Android 14+ launchers.
issues.migrationNotes: Drop-in equivalent with updated native launcher maps.

issues.name: flutter_shortcuts
issues.reason: Fails to register dynamic shortcuts on modern iOS/Android homescreens.
issues.migrationNotes: Total rewrite using official Flutter quick actions API.

issues.name: flutter_email_sender
issues.reason: File attachment intents crash due to modern FileProvider security rules.
issues.migrationNotes: Build `mailto:` schemes natively, or use backend emailing.

issues.name: flutter_sms_inbox
issues.reason: Google Play Store explicitly bans apps using this broad SMS read permission.
issues.migrationNotes: Redesign app to not scrape user text messages.

issues.name: call_log
issues.reason: Dead privacy wrapper; app will be suspended from app stores for using it.
issues.migrationNotes: Stop reading call logs.

issues.name: keyboard_actions
issues.reason: FocusNode conflicts cause the keyboard to continuously flicker open and closed.
issues.migrationNotes: Rewrite using `FocusManager.instance.primaryFocus?.unfocus()`.

issues.name: connectivity
issues.reason: Completely dead, fails on Android 14+.
issues.migrationNotes: Drop-in replacement. Change imports and class names to add `_plus`.

issues.name: share
issues.reason: Fails iOS 18 privacy manifests.
issues.migrationNotes: Drop-in. Method signatures changed slightly to support `XFile`.

issues.name: device_info
issues.reason: Missing modern device identifiers.
issues.migrationNotes: Drop-in. Update imports and model getters.

issues.name: package_info
issues.reason: Fails to read modern Gradle setups.
issues.migrationNotes: Drop-in. Returns modern async version models.

issues.name: sensors
issues.reason: Battery draining event loops.
issues.migrationNotes: Drop-in stream replacement. Better memory management.

issues.name: battery
issues.reason: API deprecations on Android 15.
issues.migrationNotes: Drop-in. Update stream listeners.

issues.name: android_intent
issues.reason: Missing modern Intent flags.
issues.migrationNotes: Drop-in. Update platform channel calls.

issues.name: charts_flutter
issues.reason: Dart 3 incompatible; looks ancient.
issues.migrationNotes: Total rewrite. You must rebuild all chart datasets from scratch.

issues.name: hive
issues.reason: Legacy architecture, sync limits, and abandoned by original creator.
issues.migrationNotes: Update to the Community Edition (hive_ce) fork which is actively maintained and Dart 3/Wasm compatible, or execute a total rewrite to Drift for relational needs.

issues.name: isar
issues.reason: Abandoned by the creator; unpatched data corruption risks with enum evolutions and weak Wasm support.
issues.migrationNotes: Total rewrite. Shift to a stable SQLite-backed architecture like Drift, or Realm if a NoSQL object store is strictly required.

issues.name: easy_localization
issues.reason: Slow updates, context leaks.
issues.migrationNotes: Heavy migration. Move from runtime parsing to build-time code generation.

issues.name: pull_to_refresh
issues.reason: Breaks Impeller physics.
issues.migrationNotes: Moderate effort. Switch controller logic to modern native RefreshIndicator wrappers.

issues.name: background_locator
issues.reason: Fails Android 14+ strict bg policies.
issues.migrationNotes: Paid plugin, but total drop-in for enterprise. (Free alt: `geolocator`).

issues.name: jitsi_meet
issues.reason: Broken WebRTC bridges.
issues.migrationNotes: Moderate effort. Update event listeners and view configurations.

issues.name: flutter_pagewise
issues.reason: Stagnant list builder logic.
issues.migrationNotes: Moderate rewrite. Shift to PagingController pattern.

issues.name: audioplayers
issues.reason: Fails on Apple Silicon builds.
issues.migrationNotes: Heavy migration. `AudioCache` is gone, completely new async API.

issues.name: file_picker
issues.reason: Returns unreadable cache paths.
issues.migrationNotes: Moderate. Update async fetching and handle new Scoped Storage rules.

issues.name: flutter_local_notifications
issues.reason: Ignores Android 14 POST flags.
issues.migrationNotes: Heavy rewrite. Initialization and tap-handling completely overhauled.

issues.name: flutter_rating_bar (Orig)
issues.reason: Broken on 120Hz screens.
issues.migrationNotes: Check for active forks or rebuild using native Gesturedetector + Row.

issues.name: js (original)
issues.reason: Blocks Wasm compilation.
issues.migrationNotes: Huge rewrite. Requires migrating to strict Wasm-ready extension types.

issues.name: flutter_slidable
issues.reason: Gestures conflict with modern Flutter internal navigators.
issues.migrationNotes: Complete rewrite of the ActionPane builders.

issues.name: google_fonts
issues.reason: Dynamic fetching blocks the main UI thread during load.
issues.migrationNotes: Drop-in update, massive performance boost.

issues.name: flutter_spinkit
issues.reason: Hardcoded TickerProviders cause exceptions when screens pop.
issues.migrationNotes: Drop-in update.

issues.name: flutter_advanced_networkimage
issues.reason: Eviction failures crash OS.
issues.migrationNotes: Total rewrite. Use standard caching logic.

issues.name: local_auth (Legacy)
issues.reason: Dead standalone package.
issues.migrationNotes: Drop-in update, improves biometric fallback mechanisms.

issues.name: moor
issues.reason: Replaced entirely by Drift; ancient code generator fails on modern Dart SDKs.
issues.migrationNotes: Requires renaming annotations and running the Drift migration tool.

issues.name: pedantic
issues.reason: Officially deprecated by the Dart team in favor of unified core lints.
issues.migrationNotes: Update analysis_options.yaml to include flutter_lints.

issues.name: effective_dart
issues.reason: Superseded by standard Dart linter rules; ruleset is obsolete.
issues.migrationNotes: Drop-in replacement in analysis options.

issues.name: lint
issues.reason: Abandoned third-party lint package; causes false positives on Dart 3 modifiers.
issues.migrationNotes: Standardize to official lints.

issues.name: flushbar
issues.reason: Discontinued; completely breaks on modern Navigator 2.0 (Router) stacks.
issues.migrationNotes: Drop-in API change to the maintained community fork.

issues.name: qr_code_scanner
issues.reason: Native bindings fail Android 15 camera foreground policies, causing instant crashes.
issues.migrationNotes: Total rewrite using ML Kit base.

issues.name: flutter_barcode_scanner
issues.reason: Uses deprecated Android V1 embeddings; refuses to compile on Gradle 8+.
issues.migrationNotes: Shift to ML Kit based scanner.

issues.name: barcode_scan
issues.reason: Abandoned repo; totally incompatible with modern iOS privacy manifests.
issues.migrationNotes: Total rewrite of scanning overlays and callbacks.

issues.name: flutter_neumorphic
issues.reason: Heavy shadow math creates massive screen tearing on the Impeller engine.
issues.migrationNotes: Update package name; underlying Impeller issues patched in fork.

issues.name: flutter_staggered_animations
issues.reason: Uses old TickerProvider architecture causing severe jank on 120Hz screens.
issues.migrationNotes: Shift to modern extension-based declarative animations.

issues.name: animations
issues.reason: Pre-Material 3 package; page transitions lack predictive back gesture support.
issues.migrationNotes: Total rewrite. Use native Material 3 transitions where possible.

issues.name: simple_animations
issues.reason: Stateless animation logic is fundamentally incompatible with Dart 3 type safety.
issues.migrationNotes: Total syntax rewrite using modern Control constructs.

issues.name: fluro
issues.reason: Legacy routing system that fundamentally conflicts with deep-linking in Router API.
issues.migrationNotes: Massive rewrite. Shift to declarative route trees.

issues.name: beamer
issues.reason: Maintainer MIA; unpatched bugs with WebAssembly (Wasm) URL synchronization.
issues.migrationNotes: Total architectural rewrite for navigation.

issues.name: vrouter
issues.reason: Dead project; throws layout exceptions when resizing Wasm browser windows.
issues.migrationNotes: Shift to official Flutter routing package.

issues.name: routemaster
issues.reason: Unmaintained; memory leaks active Route objects on heavy app traversal.
issues.migrationNotes: Rewrite tab navigation and route delegates.

issues.name: flutter_modular
issues.reason: Global singletons block Dart 3 compilation; deeply flawed memory management.
issues.migrationNotes: Complete module syntax refactoring.

issues.name: dio_http_cache
issues.reason: Incompatible with Dio v5+; causes unresolvable pubspec dependency conflicts.
issues.migrationNotes: Drop-in interceptor swap, but different cache store configurations.

issues.name: alice
issues.reason: Overlay intercepts block native predictive back gestures on Android 14.
issues.migrationNotes: Maintained fork with exact same API.

issues.name: catcher
issues.reason: Fails to capture modern Flutter engine unhandled isolate errors.
issues.migrationNotes: Drop-in replacement to the maintained version.

issues.name: flutter_crashlytics
issues.reason: Uses the defunct Fabric namespace; logs will go to a dead server.
issues.migrationNotes: Total initialization rewrite. Use modern Firebase Core.

issues.name: firebase_ml_vision
issues.reason: Google permanently retired the backend APIs; package is functionally dead.
issues.migrationNotes: Huge rewrite. Shift from Firebase to on-device ML Kit.

issues.name: flutter_camera_ml_vision
issues.reason: Fails iOS 18 hardware privacy manifests, causing automatic app rejection.
issues.migrationNotes: Total rewrite of camera view integration.

issues.name: camerawesome
issues.reason: Lacks Android Scoped Storage flags; videos save to corrupted, unreadable paths.
issues.migrationNotes: Significant rewrite of the builder syntax.

issues.name: flutter_villains
issues.reason: Uses highly deprecated page transition math; causes blank screens on push.
issues.migrationNotes: Replace with modern animation extensions.

issues.name: rubber
issues.reason: Gesture physics deadlocks with Flutter's internal Scrollables.
issues.migrationNotes: Use native or standard bottom sheet implementations.

issues.name: sliding_up_panel
issues.reason: Causes fatal layout constraints errors on foldable devices.
issues.migrationNotes: Drop-in API change to fix layout math.

issues.name: backdrop
issues.reason: Completely incompatible with Material 3 standard theming.
issues.migrationNotes: Moderate theme updates required.

issues.name: flutter_inappbrowser
issues.reason: Legacy wrapper; fails Wasm compilation and uses obsolete WKWebView configs.
issues.migrationNotes: Update namespace and controller syntax.

issues.name: flutter_webview_pro
issues.reason: Abandoned file-upload fork; modern webview_flutter supports files natively.
issues.migrationNotes: Total rewrite to modern official plugin.

issues.name: flutter_fluid_slider
issues.reason: Custom path drawing throws severe artifacting errors on Impeller.
issues.migrationNotes: Change widget implementation.

issues.name: flutter_xlider
issues.reason: Pre-null-safety; codebase completely fails to compile on Dart 3.
issues.migrationNotes: Drop-in fork.

issues.name: flutter_rating
issues.reason: Dead repository; incompatible with Material 3 iconography sizes.
issues.migrationNotes: UI component swap.

issues.name: smooth_star_rating
issues.reason: Internal GestureDetector freezes input loops on 120Hz displays.
issues.migrationNotes: UI component swap.

issues.name: flutter_colorpicker
issues.reason: Relies on deprecated HSV math that creates inaccurate hex codes.
issues.migrationNotes: Moderate rewrite. Update color translation handling.

issues.name: color_picker
issues.reason: Dead project; dialog contexts leak and crash modern navigators.
issues.migrationNotes: Swap dialog implementation.

issues.name: flutter_material_color_picker
issues.reason: Doesn't support Material 3 seed-generated color schemes.
issues.migrationNotes: Swap widget and update logic.

issues.name: day_night_time_picker
issues.reason: Animation controllers are left un-disposed, causing massive memory leaks.
issues.migrationNotes: Mostly drop-in, update imports.

issues.name: flutter_rounded_date_picker
issues.reason: Uses deprecated Theme properties that immediately throw compilation errors.
issues.migrationNotes: Moderate rewrite. Dialog presentation changed.

issues.name: flutter_calendar
issues.reason: Unmaintained; layout fails entirely on web/Wasm targets.
issues.migrationNotes: Massive rewrite. Shift to modern calendar builders.

issues.name: flutter_calendar_carousel
issues.reason: Swiping physics conflicts with Flutter 3 engine updates, causing stutter.
issues.migrationNotes: Complete UI swap.

issues.name: syncfusion_flutter_calendar
issues.reason: Legacy commercial package; completely fails Dart 3 type checks.
issues.migrationNotes: Update license keys and fix null-safety breaks.

issues.name: intro_slider
issues.reason: Layouts render as 1x1 pixel boxes on foldable and dual-screen devices.
issues.migrationNotes: UI rewrite. Data models for pages changed.

issues.name: intro_views_flutter
issues.reason: Ignores device SafeAreas; content is obscured by modern mobile notches.
issues.migrationNotes: Total UI replacement.

issues.name: flutter_onboarding_slider
issues.reason: Ghosted repo; state misfires cause onboarding to skip pages randomly.
issues.migrationNotes: Total UI replacement.

issues.name: transformer_page_view
issues.reason: Matrix translations are obsolete and crash the Impeller renderer.
issues.migrationNotes: Rethink page view animations.

issues.name: page_view_indicators
issues.reason: Dead repo; doesn't support dynamically sized or infinite pagers.
issues.migrationNotes: Swap indicator UI.

issues.name: flutter_typeahead
issues.reason: Overlay floats behind keyboards on modern Android 14 inset architectures.
issues.migrationNotes: Major update to overlay rendering logic.

issues.name: autocomplete_textfield
issues.reason: Fails to release FocusNodes, breaking physical keyboard inputs on iPadOS.
issues.migrationNotes: Rewrite the suggestion builder callbacks.

issues.name: flutter_search_bar
issues.reason: Overrides AppBar illegally in Material 3; breaks standard Scaffold layouts.
issues.migrationNotes: Use Flutter's built-in M3 SearchAnchor widget.

issues.name: material_floating_search_bar
issues.reason: Throws 'RenderBox was not laid out' exceptions when rotating the device.
issues.migrationNotes: Total UI rewrite. Shift to native Material 3 widgets.

issues.name: search_widget
issues.reason: Uses legacy dart:io calls that completely block WebAssembly (Wasm) builds.
issues.migrationNotes: Total UI rewrite.

issues.name: flutter_chips_input
issues.reason: Text deletion triggers out-of-bounds exceptions, crashing the app.
issues.migrationNotes: Moderate rewrite of input controllers.

issues.name: badges
issues.reason: Positioning logic broken; badges render off-screen in Material 3.
issues.migrationNotes: Syntax overhaul; badge positioning changed entirely.

issues.name: flutter_inner_drawer
issues.reason: Fails completely with predictive back gestures on Android 14.
issues.migrationNotes: Architecture change. Update scaffold wrapping.

issues.name: hidden_drawer_menu
issues.reason: Dead project; animation controllers lack disposal logic.
issues.migrationNotes: Total UI overhaul.

issues.name: foldable_sidebar
issues.reason: Abandoned; incompatible with null safety and Dart 3.
issues.migrationNotes: Total UI overhaul.

issues.name: unicorndial
issues.reason: Breaks entirely with standard Scaffold floatingActionButtonLocations.
issues.migrationNotes: Moderate rewrite of action items.

issues.name: hawk_fab_menu
issues.reason: Obsolete custom animations that conflict with the native engine.
issues.migrationNotes: Total UI rewrite.

issues.name: flutter_arc_speed_dial
issues.reason: Trigonometry math fails on high-DPI screens, displacing icons.
issues.migrationNotes: Total UI rewrite.

issues.name: bubble_bottom_bar
issues.reason: Fails safe area constraints; overflows into the iOS Dynamic Island.
issues.migrationNotes: Moderate rewrite. Update item building logic.

issues.name: curved_navigation_bar
issues.reason: Severe stutter when pushing new routes over the bar.
issues.migrationNotes: Fix dependencies and null-safety errors.

issues.name: fancy_bottom_navigation
issues.reason: Contains non-standard JS interops that fail Wasm compilation.
issues.migrationNotes: Total UI rewrite.

issues.name: convex_bottom_bar
issues.reason: Gesture area overlaps system navigation bars on Android 15.
issues.migrationNotes: Update handling of system insets.

issues.name: flutter_snake_navigationbar
issues.reason: Shader effects conflict with the Impeller engine, crashing the app.
issues.migrationNotes: Total UI rewrite.

issues.name: bottom_navy_bar
issues.reason: Dead repository; unoptimized rebuilds cause CPU spiking.
issues.migrationNotes: UI swap. Similar aesthetic.

issues.name: responsive_builder
issues.reason: Hardcoded breakpoints are totally obsolete for modern foldables.
issues.migrationNotes: Refactor sizing information properties.

issues.name: flutter_screenutil
issues.reason: Init function crashes on initialization in modern Flutter views.
issues.migrationNotes: Update init pattern to use standard builders.

issues.name: size_config
issues.reason: Antiquated singleton pattern that breaks completely on web resizes.
issues.migrationNotes: Massive rewrite to responsive scaling.

issues.name: easy_localization_loader
issues.reason: Asset bundles fail to load synchronously, breaking Wasm builds.
issues.migrationNotes: Shift from runtime loading to code-generation.

issues.name: flutter_i18n
issues.reason: Unmaintained; delegates fail to register properly in Dart 3.
issues.migrationNotes: Total rewrite of localization architecture.

issues.name: i18n_extension
issues.reason: String extension injections leak memory wildly on large translation sets.
issues.migrationNotes: Massive syntax rewrite.

issues.name: intl_translation
issues.reason: Officially deprecated by the Dart team.
issues.migrationNotes: Shift to the community standard generation.

issues.name: flutter_localizations
issues.reason: Pre-null-safety; lacks modern RTL language mappings.
issues.migrationNotes: Update SDK constraints.

issues.name: flutter_mobx
issues.reason: Generators output invalid Dart 3 code, blocking compilation.
issues.migrationNotes: Update build_runner and regenerate all stores.

issues.name: fish_redux
issues.reason: Abandoned by Alibaba; deeply incompatible with Dart 3 class modifiers.
issues.migrationNotes: Total architecture rewrite. Huge effort.

issues.name: flutter_redux
issues.reason: Architecturally obsolete; causes unnecessary full-tree widget rebuilds.
issues.migrationNotes: Total rewrite to event-driven bloc architecture.

issues.name: redux
issues.reason: Synchronous reducers block the main thread causing UI freezing.
issues.migrationNotes: Total rewrite.

issues.name: mvc_pattern
issues.reason: Non-idiomatic framework that breaks modern Flutter DevTools.
issues.migrationNotes: Complete paradigm shift.

issues.name: stacked
issues.reason: ViewModel locators throw exceptions due to old Provider bindings.
issues.migrationNotes: Update ViewModel builder syntax.

issues.name: momentum
issues.reason: Dead state management library; causes infinite build loops.
issues.migrationNotes: Total rewrite.

issues.name: binder
issues.reason: Abandoned state library; incompatible with Impeller engine bindings.
issues.migrationNotes: Total rewrite.

issues.name: flutter_hooks
issues.reason: Hook states decouple and cause memory leaks on rapid navigation.
issues.migrationNotes: Update syntax and hook definitions.

issues.name: functional_widget
issues.reason: Code generator is dead; fails to generate valid Dart 3 widgets.
issues.migrationNotes: Rewrite using HookConsumerWidgets manually.

issues.name: flutter_stetho
issues.reason: Meta discontinued Stetho; fails to build with modern Android Gradle Plugins.
issues.migrationNotes: Use standard Dart tooling for DB debugging.

issues.name: flutter_flipperkit
issues.reason: Native bridges completely fail to compile on Apple Silicon (M-series) Macs.
issues.migrationNotes: Use official Flutter DevTools.

issues.name: moor_ffi
issues.reason: Deprecated native bridges; entirely breaks Wasm compilation.
issues.migrationNotes: Update SQLite dependency structures.

issues.name: sqflite_sqlcipher
issues.reason: Dead package; native C bindings break on Android 15.
issues.migrationNotes: Update imports and native libraries.

issues.name: shared_preferences_windows
issues.reason: Integrated into the core package; keeping this causes duplicate symbol errors.
issues.migrationNotes: Remove explicit dependency.

issues.name: shared_preferences_macos
issues.reason: Integrated into core package; redundant dead weight.
issues.migrationNotes: Remove explicit dependency.

issues.name: shared_preferences_web
issues.reason: Integrated into core package; redundant dead weight.
issues.migrationNotes: Remove explicit dependency.

issues.name: sembast
issues.reason: Synchronous writes freeze the UI thread on modern devices.
issues.migrationNotes: Major update to async database factory logic.

issues.name: localstorage
issues.reason: Uses obsolete synchronous file I/O that crashes Wasm applications.
issues.migrationNotes: Total rewrite. Data must be migrated.

issues.name: flutter_cache_manager
issues.reason: Fails to clear disk space, leading to out-of-storage app crashes.
issues.migrationNotes: Update cache eviction callbacks.

issues.name: http_middleware
issues.reason: Incompatible with the modern Dart http package architecture.
issues.migrationNotes: Rewrite request interceptors.

issues.name: chopper
issues.reason: Code generator fails completely on Dart 3.
issues.migrationNotes: Regenerate all network services.

issues.name: retrofit
issues.reason: Pre-null-safety; generator outputs dead code.
issues.migrationNotes: Regenerate client services.

issues.name: graphql
issues.reason: Fails to compile on modern Flutter SDKs.
issues.migrationNotes: Huge rewrite. Link configurations changed entirely.

issues.name: hasura_connect
issues.reason: Unmaintained; websockets instantly disconnect from modern Hasura backends.
issues.migrationNotes: Total network architecture rewrite.

issues.name: flutter_socket_io
issues.reason: Hardcoded to ancient Android NDKs that Play Store rejects.
issues.migrationNotes: Total rewrite.

issues.name: flutter_pusher
issues.reason: Abandoned; native bindings throw unhandled exceptions.
issues.migrationNotes: Use official pusher SDK.

issues.name: pusher_websocket_flutter
issues.reason: Fails on iOS 18 background execution policies.
issues.migrationNotes: Total rewrite of channel binding logic.

issues.name: signalr_flutter
issues.reason: Dead repo; connections fail against .NET 8+ backends.
issues.migrationNotes: Moderate connection string update.

issues.name: agora_rtc_engine
issues.reason: Agora officially retired these SDK versions; calls will not connect.
issues.migrationNotes: Massive rewrite of video view and event handlers.

issues.name: youtube_player_iframe
issues.reason: YouTube blocked the old Web API; iframe renders a black screen.
issues.migrationNotes: Controller syntax completely changed.

issues.name: audioplayer
issues.reason: Completely dead package; conflicts directly with modern audio routers.
issues.migrationNotes: Total syntax replacement.

issues.name: flutter_sound_lite
issues.reason: Deprecated by maintainers in favor of the full package.
issues.migrationNotes: API drop-in, but requires full FFMPEG setup.

issues.name: flutter_midi
issues.reason: C++ bridges fail completely on macOS 15, blocking desktop builds.
issues.migrationNotes: Total rewrite using Dart-native synthesis.

issues.name: camera
issues.reason: Fails Android 14 Scoped Storage and iOS 18 hardware manifest requirements.
issues.migrationNotes: Heavy update to async camera initialization.

issues.name: mapbox_gl
issues.reason: Discontinued by Mapbox; map tiles will fail to load.
issues.migrationNotes: Total rewrite to the official v10 SDK.

issues.name: flutter_map
issues.reason: Leaflet core fundamentally broken; maps render as gray squares.
issues.migrationNotes: Complete rewrite of map options and layers.

issues.name: location
issues.reason: Fails Android 14 exact vs approximate location prompt requirements.
issues.migrationNotes: Update permission request flow.

issues.name: bitsdojo_window
issues.reason: Fails to compile on modern Windows 11 SDKs.
issues.migrationNotes: Total rewrite of desktop window controls.

issues.name: desktop_window
issues.reason: Obsolete since native Flutter desktop size support was added.
issues.migrationNotes: Total rewrite.

issues.name: window_size
issues.reason: Obsolete experimental package discontinued by Google.
issues.migrationNotes: Total rewrite.

issues.name: flutter_web_plugins
issues.reason: Built directly into the Flutter SDK now; causes namespace collisions.
issues.migrationNotes: Remove explicit dependency.

issues.name: timeago
issues.reason: Pre-null-safety; blocks Dart 3 compilation.
issues.migrationNotes: Update syntax for custom locales.

issues.name: date_format
issues.reason: Dead repository; incompatible with modern intl patterns.
issues.migrationNotes: Rewrite all date string parsing.

issues.name: supercharged
issues.reason: String/Number extensions fail Dart 3 strict typing.
issues.migrationNotes: Syntax updates required.

issues.name: fluttertoast
issues.reason: Uses deprecated overlay APIs causing context leaks and app freezes.
issues.migrationNotes: Shift to contextless FToast pattern.

issues.name: flutter_absolute_path
issues.reason: Dead file URI parser; fails completely on Android 14 ContentProviders.
issues.migrationNotes: Rewrite all local file path resolution.

issues.name: file_utils
issues.reason: Abandoned package; redundant with Dart's modern dart:io.
issues.migrationNotes: Use standard File and Directory classes.

issues.name: flutter_string_encryption
issues.reason: Cryptography algorithms broken by modern OS standards; insecure.
issues.migrationNotes: Total rewrite of encryption logic.

issues.name: aes_crypt
issues.reason: Insecure default paddings make it vulnerable to padding oracle attacks.
issues.migrationNotes: Rewrite using secure PKCS7 padding.

issues.name: flutter_keychain
issues.reason: Dead repository; unpatched vulnerabilities and crashes on iOS 18.
issues.migrationNotes: Total rewrite. Keys must be migrated.

issues.name: flutter_uploader
issues.reason: Background isolates fail to register on Android 15, silently failing uploads.
issues.migrationNotes: Total rewrite of background task execution.

issues.name: flutter_local_notifications
issues.reason: Fails Android 14 POST_NOTIFICATIONS requirements.
issues.migrationNotes: Requires explicitly asking for exact notification permissions.

issues.name: flutter_native_timezone
issues.reason: Integrated into flutter_timezone; keeping this causes linker errors.
issues.migrationNotes: Drop-in API change.

issues.name: timezone
issues.reason: Pre-null-safety; blocks Dart 3 compilation entirely.
issues.migrationNotes: Total rewrite of timezone initialization and database fetching logic.

issues.name: flutter_phone_direct_caller
issues.reason: Hardcoded to obsolete Java 8 and missing AGP namespaces; native bindings crash on Android Gradle Plugin 8+ and iOS 18.
issues.migrationNotes: Use `url_launcher` with the `tel:` scheme to open the system dialer. Bypassing the dialer entirely is no longer recommended due to modern OS privacy restrictions.

issues.name: get
issues.migrationNotes: While popular, GetX creates massive coupling and navigation issues on modern Router setups.

issues.name: flare_flutter
issues.migrationNotes: Rewrite animation loading and state machines using the new `rive` package syntax.

issues.name: flutter_clean_architecture
issues.migrationNotes: Abandoned. Implement clean architecture concepts using native standard widgets and standard state management (e.g., flutter_bloc).

issues.name: flutter_vibrate
issues.migrationNotes: Use standard `HapticFeedback.vibrate()` from `package:flutter/services.dart`.

issues.name: speech_recognition
issues.migrationNotes: Complete rewrite of async initialization and stream listening.

issues.name: random_string
issues.migrationNotes: Use proper UUIDs or standard cryptographically secure random number generators.

issues.name: hardware_buttons
issues.migrationNotes: Native interceptors cause crashes on Android 14 predictive back paths. Use modern Flutter routing handles.

issues.name: shimmer
issues.reason: Significant performance issues (UI jank) were reported with this package.
issues.migrationNotes: Replace Shimmer widgets with Skeletonizer wrappers around your actual UI widgets.

issues.name: fade_shimmer
issues.reason: Significant performance issues (UI jank) were reported with this package.
issues.migrationNotes: Replace FadeShimmer widgets with Skeletonizer wrappers around your actual UI widgets.

issues.name: dart_code_metrics_annotations
issues.reason: Hooks the codebase directly into a commercial, vendor-locked ecosystem (dcm.dev). Actual trial-ware / pay to play.
issues.migrationNotes: Remove DCM annotations and dependencies. Replace with saropa_lints (https://pub.dev/packages/saropa_lints) — a drop-in replacement with vastly more coverage: 2057 custom lint rules and 132 quick fixes for Flutter and Dart. Catches memory leaks, security vulnerabilities, and runtime crashes that standard linters miss. No vendor lock-in, no pay gates.

issues.name: blinkid_flutter
issues.reason: Premium, closed-source SDK wrapper. Requires a paid commercial license key from Microblink to function in production.
issues.migrationNotes: Migrate to free, on-device alternatives like Google ML Kit for standard document, ID, and barcode scanning needs.

issues.name: zego_uikit_prebuilt_call
issues.reason: Hooks the app into ZEGOCLOUD's proprietary infrastructure. Shifts from free-tier to a pay-as-you-go commercial model at scale.
issues.migrationNotes: Total rewrite. Move to an open-source WebRTC implementation (like LiveKit or standard flutter_webrtc) to avoid per-minute usage fees.

issues.name: stream_chat_flutter
issues.reason: Proprietary Chat-as-a-Service SaaS. While it has a startup tier, it is a heavily vendor-locked enterprise product that scales aggressively in cost.
issues.migrationNotes: Major architecture shift. If budget is a strict constraint, build custom real-time messaging using standard WebSockets or cheaper cloud databases.

issues.name: scanbot_sdk
issues.reason: Strictly commercial enterprise SDK. Cannot be used in production without purchasing a highly expensive yearly corporate license from Scanbot.
issues.migrationNotes: Drop the proprietary SDK and switch to open-source ML Kit-based barcode scanning.

issues.name: purchases_flutter
issues.reason: RevenueCat's proprietary wrapper. Free up to a specific monthly revenue limit, after which they take a percentage cut of your app's earnings.
issues.migrationNotes: Heavy rewrite of the entitlement validation engine. Shift to Flutter's official in-app purchase plugin and manage subscription states on your own backend.

issues.name: syncfusion_flutter_core
issues.reason: Syncfusion offers a 'Community License', but it is a legal trap. The moment your company hits $1M USD in gross revenue OR has more than 5 developers, you are legally required to buy their enterprise licenses.
issues.migrationNotes: Massive rewrite. You must strip out all Syncfusion UI components (charts, grids, PDF viewers) and replace them with individual open-source equivalents to avoid licensing audits.

issues.name: agora_rtc_engine
issues.reason: Hooks into Agora's proprietary video/audio routing cloud. They offer 10,000 free minutes a month, but scaling a social or calling app on this will quickly result in massive monthly server bills.
issues.migrationNotes: Total rewrite of the calling architecture. Shift to an open-source WebRTC standard and self-host your signaling servers (e.g., using LiveKit or Janus).

issues.name: mapbox_maps_flutter
issues.reason: Requires an active billing account and credit card to even generate the necessary public tokens. Charges per map-load/API request after you exceed their free tier.
issues.migrationNotes: Rewrite map implementation using `flutter_map` tied to completely free OpenStreetMap (OSM) tile servers, bypassing commercial tile providers.

issues.name: appsflyer_sdk
issues.reason: Strictly commercial mobile attribution platform. Used for deep-linking and ad-spend tracking, but their pricing tiers are famously opaque and geared strictly toward enterprise budgets.
issues.migrationNotes: Shift tracking and deep-linking to Firebase Dynamic Links (or standard App Links) and use open-source or cheaper analytics platforms.

issues.name: sendbird_chat_sdk
issues.reason: A heavy, proprietary Chat-as-a-Service SDK. Their free tier is heavily crippled (limits on MAUs and concurrent connections), forcing a rapid upgrade to very expensive paid tiers.
issues.migrationNotes: Strip out the Sendbird UI and SDK. Build your own messaging repository layer using Dart WebSockets and an open-source backend.

issues.name: datadog_flutter_plugin
issues.reason: Enterprise observability and Application Performance Monitoring (APM). No permanent free tier; you pay heavily per millions of sessions logged.
issues.migrationNotes: Remove Datadog initialization and routing observers. Rely on standard Crashlytics for fatal errors and standard analytics for user funnels.

issues.name: superwallkit_flutter
issues.reason: A paywall-as-a-service provider. Like RevenueCat, they inject themselves into your monetization flow and take a cut or charge a flat SaaS fee to manage your subscription UI.
issues.migrationNotes: Build native Flutter paywall UIs and handle the App Store/Play Store receipt validation natively or on your own server.

issues.name: flutter_uxcam
issues.reason: Session recording and heat-mapping tool. Generous free tier, but the cost scales incredibly steeply once you have a moderate user base.
issues.migrationNotes: Remove screen recording SDKs entirely. They often cause App Store privacy review headaches anyway. Rely on standard telemetry.

issues.name: realm
issues.reason: While the local Realm database is open-source, the package heavily pushes 'Device Sync', which permanently vendor-locks your app's data layer to paid MongoDB Atlas cloud instances.
issues.migrationNotes: Migrate local schemas to Drift (SQLite) and write standard API syncing logic to remain backend-agnostic.

issues.name: cometchat_chat_uikit
issues.reason: Another heavy Chat BaaS (Backend-as-a-Service). Trial-ware that demands an expensive monthly subscription for basic features like push notifications and media sharing.
issues.migrationNotes: Total UI and backend swap. Roll your own chat components.

issues.name: better_player
issues.migrationNotes: Development has stalled. Consider migrating to `media_kit` for modern hardware-accelerated video rendering.

issues.name: spritewidget
issues.migrationNotes: Abandoned 2D game engine. Replaced entirely by Flame in the modern Flutter ecosystem.

issues.name: flutter_sequence_animation
issues.migrationNotes: Unmaintained. Use `flutter_animate` for highly readable declarative animation sequences.

issues.name: bouncing_widget
issues.migrationNotes: Dead repository. Touch-scale effects are now trivial to implement with standard animation extensions.

issues.name: flutter_native_image
issues.migrationNotes: Abandoned native code fails to compile on modern Android Gradle configurations.
